parameters.query: INSERT INTO sentiment_logs (session_id, user_message, sentiment, confidence, tone_used, ai_response, model_used) VALUES ('{{ $json.sessionId }}', '{{ $json.userMessage.replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ $json.sentiment }}', {{ $json.confidence }}, '{{ $json.toneUsed }}', '{{ $json.aiMessage.replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ $json.modelUsed }}') RETURNING id;
